object_a.label: wall feature
object_a.long_form_open_description: Continuous white baseboard trim running along the bottom of the walls and stairs; visible at the foot of the stairs and along the left wall, providing contrast to the beige wall color.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: runs along the base of the stairs and left wall, below the light switch and wall sign
object_a.object_text_long: left sector | Continuous white baseboard trim running along the bottom of the walls and stairs; visible at the foot of the stairs and along the left wall, providing contrast to the beige wall color.
object_a.text_input_for_clip_long: left sector | Continuous white baseboard trim running along the bottom of the walls and stairs; visible at the foot of the stairs and along the left wall, providing contrast to the beige wall color.

object_b.label: chair
object_b.long_form_open_description: Oversized single-seat dark brown leather recliner with visible padded seams and reclining mechanism. Positioned on the left third of image, oriented slightly toward the center. Leather shows slight sheen and creasing consistent with use.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: to the left of the left window and adjacent to a small wooden end table
